testcase.name: test_docx_extraction

skipped.message: DOCX extraction test requires a real DOCX file. Use python-docx to create test files if needed.

testcase.skipped: C:\HiteeshHub\Projects\Portfolio_project\rag-offline-chatbot\tests\test_integration.py:82: DOCX extraction test requires a real DOCX file. Use python-docx to create test files if needed.

testcase.name: test_text_embedding
testcase.failure: tests\test_integration.py:94: in test_text_embedding assert embedding.shape[1] == 384 # MiniLM-L6-v2 dimension E assert 512 == 384

testcase.name: test_text_embeddings_batch
testcase.failure: tests\test_integration.py:104: in test_text_embeddings_batch assert embeddings.shape[1] == 384 E assert 512 == 384

testcase.name: test_embedding_model_loading

failure.message:
AssertionError: assert False + where False = hasattr(CLIP(
 (visual): VisionTransformer(
 (conv1): Conv2d(3, 768, kernel_size=(32, 32), stride=(32, 32), bias=False)
 (patch_dropout): Identity()
 (ln_pre): LayerNorm((768,), eps=1e-05, elementwise_affine=True)
 (transformer): Transformer(
 (resblocks): ModuleList(
 (0-11): 12 x ResidualAttentionBlock(
 (ln_1): LayerNorm((768,), eps=1e-05, elementwise_affine=True)
 (attn): MultiheadAttention(
 (out_proj): NonDynamicallyQuantizableLinear(in_features=768, out_features=768, bias=True)
 )
 (ls_1): Identity()
 (ln_2): LayerNorm((768,), eps=1e-05, elementwise_affine=True)
 (mlp): Sequential(
 (c_fc): Linear(in_features=768, out_features=3072, bias=True)
 (gelu): QuickGELU()
 (c_proj): Linear(in_features=3072, out_features=768, bias=True)
 )
 (ls_2): Identity()
 )
 )
 )
 (ln_post): LayerNorm((768,), eps=1e-05, elementwise_affine=True)
 )
 (transformer): Transformer(
 (resblocks): ModuleList(
 (0-11): 12 x ResidualAttentionBlock(
 (ln_1): LayerNorm((512,), eps=1e-05, elementwise_affine=True)
 (attn): MultiheadAttention(
 (out_proj): NonDynamicallyQuantizableLinear(in_features=512, out_features=512, bias=True)
 )
 (ls_1): Identity()
 (ln_2): LayerNorm((512,), eps=1e-05, elementwise_affine=True)
 (mlp): Sequential(
 (c_fc): Linear(in_features=512, out_features=2048, bias=True)
 (gelu): QuickGELU()
 (c_proj): Linear(in_features=2048, out_features=512, bias=True)
 )
 (ls_2): Identity()
 )
 )
 )
 (token_embedding): Embedding(49408, 512)
 (ln_final): LayerNorm((512,), eps=1e-05, elementwise_affine=True)
), 'encode')

testcase.failure:
tests	est_integration.py:112: in test_embedding_model_loading assert hasattr(model, 'encode') E AssertionError: assert False E + where False = hasattr(CLIP(
 (visual): VisionTransformer(
 (conv1): Conv2d(3, 768, kernel_size=(32, 32), stride=(32, 32), bias=False)
 (patch_dropout): Identity()
 (ln_pre): LayerNorm((768,), eps=1e-05, elementwise_affine=True)
 (transformer): Transformer(
 (resblocks): ModuleList(
 (0-11): 12 x ResidualAttentionBlock(
 (ln_1): LayerNorm((768,), eps=1e-05, elementwise_affine=True)
 (attn): MultiheadAttention(
 (out_proj): NonDynamicallyQuantizableLinear(in_features=768, out_features=768, bias=True)
 )
 (ls_1): Identity()
 (ln_2): LayerNorm((768,), eps=1e-05, elementwise_affine=True)
 (mlp): Sequential(
 (c_fc): Linear(in_features=768, out_features=3072, bias=True)
 (gelu): QuickGELU()
 (c_proj): Linear(in_features=3072, out_features=768, bias=True)
 )
 (ls_2): Identity()
 )
 )
 )
 (ln_post): LayerNorm((768,), eps=1e-05, elementwise_affine=True)
 )
 (transformer): Transformer(
 (resblocks): ModuleList(
 (0-11): 12 x ResidualAttentionBlock(
 (ln_1): LayerNorm((512,), eps=1e-05, elementwise_affine=True)
 (attn): MultiheadAttention(
 (out_proj): NonDynamicallyQuantizableLinear(in_features=512, out_features=512, bias=True)
 )
 (ls_1): Identity()
 (ln_2): LayerNorm((512,), eps=1e-05, elementwise_affine=True)
 (mlp): Sequential(
 (c_fc): Linear(in_features=512, out_features=2048, bias=True)
 (gelu): QuickGELU()
 (c_proj): Linear(in_features=2048, out_features=512, bias=True)
 )
 (ls_2): Identity()
 )
 )
 )
 (token_embedding): Embedding(49408, 512)
 (ln_final): LayerNorm((512,), eps=1e-05, elementwise_affine=True)
), 'encode')

testcase.name: test_faiss_store_creation
testcase.failure: tests\test_integration.py:124: in test_faiss_store_creation assert store.index is not None E AttributeError: 'FAISSStore' object has no attribute 'index'

testcase.name: test_retriever_creation
testcase.failure: tests\test_integration.py:200: in test_retriever_creation assert retriever.storage is not None E AttributeError: 'Retriever' object has no attribute 'storage'

testcase.name: test_end_to_end_ingestion
testcase.failure: tests\test_integration.py:343: in test_end_to_end_ingestion assert len(results) > 0 E assert 0 > 0 E + where 0 = len([])

testcase.name: test_similarity_flow
testcase.failure: tests\test_search.py:32: in test_similarity_flow assert res[0]["content"] == texts[0] E KeyError: 'content'
